package_description: Boiler, steam, insulation, condensate-return, and economiser retrofit bundle for low-temperature fossil heat systems.
rollout_limit_notes: Use as an indicative cap on retrofit-eligible incumbent fossil heat activity; uptake is constrained by outage windows, retrofit access, and plant capital budgeting.
evidence_summary: Australian process-heat guidance supports a moderate carrier-preserving gas-saving wedge from insulation, condensate return, economisers, and related thermal-system upgrades.
derivation_method: Thin-slice calibration uses a conservative 8% gas-intensity reduction and a modest non-commodity cost adder so the package remains clearly smaller than a route switch to electrified heat.
review_notes: Keep this package on the fossil incumbent only so it stays separable from electrification and low-carbon-fuel route changes.

package_description: Operational tuning package covering setpoints, sequencing, combustion tuning, metering, and maintenance on low-temperature fossil heat systems.
rollout_limit_notes: Operational tuning can scale faster than major retrofits, but savings persistence depends on monitoring, controls quality, and plant operating discipline.
evidence_summary: Australian process-heat guidance supports a modest operational efficiency wedge on low-temperature fossil heat through controls, metering, and combustion tuning.
derivation_method: Use a conservative gas-only multiplier and low service-cost adder so the package remains the smaller operational companion to the low-temperature thermal-system retrofit.
review_notes: Shares the family-local non-stacking group with the thermal-system retrofit so the model chooses at most one portable low-temperature package per activity slice.
